habitat.text: Malay Peninsula and Sumatra, and the tropical regions of both Hemispheres

indications.text: The leaves and stalks roasted have long been used in China in the form of a decoction, as a cure for the opium habit, the daily dose of opium is added to a decoction of the leaves and the patient is given 1 fluid ounce of the mixture every four hours.

constituents.text: Combretum contains a large proportion of tannic acid and traces of a glucoside.
